project_intent: Build a Spring Boot backend service for managing media metadata, media relationships, and playback-oriented resource references for a local-first media library frontend.

todos.title: Add request validation for create/update payloads
todos.details: Require title and add length bounds using Bean Validation. Completed 2026-03-09: added @Valid and Bean Validation constraints for create/update payloads with explicit 400 error responses for validation and malformed JSON.
acceptance_criteria: Invalid payloads return HTTP 400.
Validation errors include clear field-level messages.
Tests cover invalid and malformed request bodies.

todos.title: Enforce DB integrity constraints on Media
todos.details: Ensure mediaId is unique and non-null, and title is non-null. Completed 2026-03-09: added JPA column constraints and repository tests covering duplicate mediaId and null constrained fields.
acceptance_criteria: Duplicate mediaId is rejected at persistence layer.
Null title cannot be persisted.

todos.title: Introduce a service layer
todos.details: Move business/persistence flow out of controller into dedicated service class(es). Completed 2026-03-09: added MediaService/MediaServiceImpl, moved CRUD persistence/business logic from MediaController, and added service unit tests for CRUD plus not-found paths.
acceptance_criteria: Controller methods are thin and delegate to service.
Service unit tests cover CRUD business behavior.

todos.title: Add centralized exception handling
todos.details: Use @ControllerAdvice and consistent error response schema across failures. Completed 2026-03-09: added @RestControllerAdvice with stable ApiErrorResponse contract for validation, malformed JSON, not-found, and sanitized unhandled exceptions; removed per-controller exception handling and added MVC tests for contract paths.
acceptance_criteria: Validation and runtime errors share a stable JSON contract.
Unhandled exceptions return sanitized responses.

todos.title: Add GET /media list endpoint with pagination
todos.details: Support page/size and optional sorting/filtering. Completed 2026-03-29: added paginated GET /media with Spring Pageable support, optional case-insensitive title filtering, explicit page response DTOs, controller coverage, and end-to-end integration coverage.
acceptance_criteria: Clients can retrieve paginated media lists.
Endpoint behavior is covered by controller/integration tests.

todos.title: Use explicit response DTOs instead of returning entities
todos.details: Avoid exposing JPA entities directly from API responses. Completed 2026-03-29: item endpoints now return MediaResponse DTOs and list responses use MediaPageResponse, removing entity exposure from the HTTP contract.
acceptance_criteria: Controller returns response DTOs only.
Entity internals are not leaked in API contract.

todos.title: Remove or adopt MediaResponse consistently
todos.details: Current MediaResponse model exists but is not used by controller responses. Completed 2026-03-29: repurposed MediaResponse into the canonical flattened response DTO and used it consistently across item and page responses.
acceptance_criteria: No dead response models remain.
Response format decision is applied consistently.

todos.title: Fix fetchMedia logging semantics
todos.details: Ensure success/failure logs are accurate and not contradictory. Completed 2026-03-29: fetch logic lives in MediaServiceImpl and now logs only a miss on not-found or a fetch on success, eliminating the earlier contradictory controller logging.
acceptance_criteria: Success log appears only on actual hit.
Not-found path logs a single clear miss message.

todos.title: Expand controller test coverage for missing negative cases
todos.details: Add tests for GET not-found, validation failures, and malformed payloads. Completed 2026-03-29: WebMvc tests now cover GET not-found, validation failures, malformed JSON, sanitized unhandled exceptions, and paginated list behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Negative paths are explicitly tested.
Error response contract is asserted in tests.

todos.title: Add integration tests with real JPA/H2
todos.details: Use full Spring context tests to validate persistence + API flow. Completed 2026-03-29: added SpringBoot + MockMvc integration coverage for full CRUD flow and paginated filtered list behavior against H2 and real JPA repositories.
acceptance_criteria: End-to-end CRUD scenarios pass against in-memory DB.
Tests do not rely only on mocked repository behavior.

todos.title: Add profiles and schema migration tooling
todos.details: Introduce environment-specific config and schema versioning for non-memory DB use. Completed 2026-03-29: added Flyway, an initial schema migration, local/test/prod Spring profile files, default local profile selection, and PostgreSQL runtime support for prod deployments.
acceptance_criteria: Separate local/dev/prod config exists.
Schema changes are versioned and repeatable.

todos.title: Improve README
todos.details: Document setup, run/test commands, API endpoints, and examples. Completed 2026-03-29: README now covers requirements, profiles, Flyway, run/test commands, endpoint usage, and response formats.
acceptance_criteria: New contributor can run app and tests from docs alone.
API usage examples are present and accurate.

todos.title: Add CI automation
todos.details: Run the Maven test suite on every pull request and on pushes to the default branches. Completed 2026-03-29: added a GitHub Actions workflow that checks out the repo, provisions Java 17 with Maven caching, and runs ./mvnw test.
acceptance_criteria: CI runs ./mvnw test on pull requests.
CI also runs on pushes to the main development branch.

todos.title: Add Docker and Postgres runtime packaging
todos.details: Provide containerized local and production-style runtime paths. Completed 2026-03-29: added a multi-stage Dockerfile, docker-compose app + Postgres stack, and a .dockerignore for leaner builds.
acceptance_criteria: Application can be built into a container image.
Local app + Postgres stack can be started with docker compose.

todos.title: Harden API pagination and conflict handling
todos.details: Cap page size, validate/sanitize sort input, and map persistence conflicts to explicit error responses. Completed 2026-03-29: list endpoint now validates page/size/sort/direction, enforces allowed sort fields and max size, and maps DataIntegrityViolationException to a 409 Conflict contract.
acceptance_criteria: Page size is capped and invalid paging/sorting input returns HTTP 400 with field errors.
Persistence conflicts return HTTP 409 with a stable error contract.

todos.title: Add OpenAPI documentation
todos.details: Expose the REST contract through generated OpenAPI metadata so the API is discoverable without reading source code. Completed 2026-03-29: added Springdoc OpenAPI generation for the current endpoints, annotated the controller/DTO contract, documented the local docs endpoint at /v3/api-docs, and added integration coverage for the published spec. The API-only Springdoc starter is used because the Swagger UI starter was not compatible with the current Spring Boot 3.4.4 stack in this project.
acceptance_criteria: OpenAPI metadata is generated for the current endpoints.
Developers can view API docs locally at /v3/api-docs.

todos.title: Clean test/runtime warnings
todos.details: Remove the Mockito dynamic-agent warning and reduce noisy debug logs during test execution. Completed 2026-03-29: Surefire now runs Mockito with the Java agent and forces debug=false during tests, the test suite uses a dedicated Logback config to suppress Spring test/bootstrap and Springdoc chatter, repository tests disable SQL echoing, and the test profile reduces routine startup logging.
acceptance_criteria: Test suite runs without the Mockito dynamic-agent warning.
Default test logs stay focused on failures and key startup events.

todos.title: Add operational basics
todos.details: Introduce health/observability basics such as health endpoints, request correlation, and metrics-friendly dependencies. Completed 2026-03-29: added Spring Boot Actuator, exposed /actuator/health and /actuator/info, enabled health probes, propagated/generated X-Request-Id values with a request-correlation filter, added request IDs to the runtime log pattern, and covered the behavior with integration tests.
acceptance_criteria: Health endpoint is available for deployments.
Requests can be correlated in logs.

todos.title: Expand the domain model
todos.details: Decide which fields a real media item needs beyond mediaId and title, then evolve persistence, DTOs, and tests accordingly. Draft domain spec captured in docs/media-domain-spec.md on 2026-03-29. Supporting taxonomy spec for categories, tags, and ratings captured in docs/taxonomy-spec.md on 2026-03-30. Implementation progressed on 2026-03-30 with a MediaFile child collection, richer file metadata fields (label, mimeType, sizeBytes, durationSeconds, primaryFile), API exposure, validation for positive numeric fields plus a single-primary-file rule, and Flyway migrations V2__create_media_file_table.sql and V3__expand_media_file_table.sql.
acceptance_criteria: Media model captures agreed product fields.
API contract and persistence schema stay aligned.
